series_metadata.series_description: Original Statewide Credit Card Receipt & Request files by agency consisting of Credit Card Control Form (ADM 3908) and Credit Card Acknowledgement Letter (NFN).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until stored electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office five years then destroy if audit is complete, report is released & all SWCAP (State Wide Cost Allocation Plan) obligations are met., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
